ItacPersonItem.Notes: Description of emblem in Ferro, Teatro d`imprese. He was also member of the Avvivati (Fermo), and corresponded with the Intrepidi (Ferrara) (see Giorgio Fulco, `Marino, "Flavio" e il Parnaso Barocco nella corrispondenza del "Rugginoso"`, in Feconde venner le carte. Studi in onore di Ottavio Besomi, ed. Tatiana Crivelli, 1997).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
